description_long: This is a single bed with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a light wood frame and yellow accent panels on the headboard and footboard. The headboard is composed of three horizontal padded sections, providing both comfort and a visual highlight. The bed frame is solid and boxy, with clean lines and a flat platform surface, suggesting a platform-style construction. The footboard and the corners of the frame are reinforced with yellow panels, adding a pop of color and structural detail. There is no visible mattress or bedding, and the sleeping surface appears to be bare wood. The overall look is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban interiors or compact living spaces.
description: A modern single bed with a light wood platform frame and yellow padded headboard and footboard accents, featuring a bare sleeping surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the three-section padded headboard, and yellow corner accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the yellow padded headboard and the rectangular, boxy frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the bed's length, yellow footboard accent, and the flat platform surface.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back of the bed frame with yellow accents at the corners.
